message:
Running command: 
PROJECT_PATH="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
DESIGN_NAME="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
MCU_DIR="$PROJECT_PATH/$DESIGN_NAME"

echo "=== Corrected paths ==="
echo "PROJECT_PATH : $PROJECT_PATH"
echo "MCU_DIR      : $MCU_DIR"
echo ""

echo "=== Full MCU dir tree (3 levels) ==="
find "$MCU_DIR" -maxdepth 3 -not -path '*/\.*' | sort

echo ""
echo "=== Wrapper config.json ==="
cat "$MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN_NAME}_wrapper/config.json"

echo ""
echo "=== chip config.json (if exists) ==="
ls "$MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN_NAME}_chip/config.json" 2>&1
